log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Bugbear — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:1+-2=-1 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ 2/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Bugbear — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Bugbear — Armored Escapist HP: 35/59
→ Bugbear — Armored Escapist loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 10 vs DC 12]
Frost Giant attacks Bugbear — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:20+9=29 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 34 damage. Bugbear — Armored Escapist HP: 1/59
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Bugbear — Armored Escapist with Greatclub: [d20:10+6=16 vs AC 20] MISS.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Bugbear — Armored Escapist with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Bugbear — Armored Escapist's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Bugbear — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Bugbear — Armored Escapist with Greataxe: [d20:11+9=20 vs AC 20] HIT! 35 damage. Bugbear — Armored Escapist HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
